notes: Version compatibility contract between openclaw-onboarding and blackceo-command-center. fleet-refresh.sh reads pinnedTag (or resolves latest >= minVersion when pinnedTag is null) and checks out that tag. The skill-32 installer refuses to clone a CC older than minVersion. CI fails if onboardingVersion != /version or if pinnedTag < minVersion. v11.19.0 adds self-service add+wire (roles/SOPs/personas + converge); requires CC v4.39.0 for /api/system/converge endpoint. Skill 48 (facebook-ad-generator) lands ad runs on the Kanban board via the producer-side caller scripts/cc_board.py, which requires the POST/PATCH /api/ad-campaigns endpoints introduced in CC v4.50.0 (merge 89b6d5e); minVersion + pinnedTag are bumped to v4.50.0 so fleet-refresh + the skill-32 installer guarantee the endpoint is present. The board hookup is FAIL-SOFT: on a CC older than minVersion (or an unreachable board) the run degrades to ungrouped cards and logs it (INSTALL.md graceful degradation), it never fails an ad job. If CC is older, converge falls back to on-box seed-workspaces.py + ingest-sop-library.sh (graceful degradation, §1.6 step 5). v16.2.4 bumps minVersion + pinnedTag to v4.56.1 (current CC release as of 2026-06-29; fixes fleet-refresh deploying stale CC v4.50.0 to every box). v16.4.0 registers Skill 50 (email-engine): the Email Engine lands DRAFT-ONLY email jobs on the existing marketing Kanban lane via the Command Center's existing task/board endpoints and the Skill-44 Convert & Flow deploy handoff — it introduces NO new CC endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change, so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). The board hookup is FAIL-SOFT: on an unreachable board the run degrades to a local draft plan and logs it, it never fails an email job. Nothing is sent without explicit human approval. v16.5.0 registers Skill 49 (signature-funnel): the Signature Funnel AUTHORS the SACRED 12-section Hero copy + the per-section image prompts inside its own fail-closed pipeline, then DELEGATES image generation to Skill 47 and ALL GoHighLevel media + funnel/page build to Skill 6 (the ONE GHL delivery rail) via Skill 6's EXISTING REST canvas / builder + media endpoints; a 'signature funnel' request routes to it through the new shared STEP-0 funnel-engine selector registry in Skill 6 (06-ghl-install-pages/funnel-engines/registry.json). It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change (funnel jobs ride the existing web-development / QC Kanban lanes, fail-soft), so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Publish is human-approved (preview URLs + labeled ~/Downloads bundle only); nothing is published without explicit human approval. v16.6.0 registers Skill 55 (product-bio): the Product Bio Engine turns a 4-field intake into the 6,000-7,000-word, 10-section master-brain product bio + its Google-Docs-importable HTML as a LOCAL-ONLY labeled ~/Downloads deliverable on the CLIENT's own model providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys), replacing the retired 25-node n8n / Google Drive / Slack / Gmail workflow. It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change (a product-bio job is an existing tasks / marketing Kanban row, fail-soft), so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Delivery is local + human-reviewed; nothing is sent to any external service (no n8n / Drive / Slack / Gmail / Airtable) at runtime. v16.7.0 registers Skill 52 (avatar-alchemist): the Avatar Alchemist brand-intelligence engine turns ONE completed brand-intake interview into the full brand-intelligence package (40 generators across 7 subsystems -> 16 named deliverables / 37 documents) as a LOCAL-ONLY labeled ~/Downloads bundle with a signed provenance certificate, on the CLIENT's own model providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys), replacing the retired 233-node n8n / Airtable / Google Drive / Slack / Gmail workflow. A Book/Brand version selector runs FIRST (version=book routes to Skill 53 or parks fail-closed, never the brand pipeline). Downstream handoffs (bot docs -> Skill 38; Top-39 / headline / targeting -> Skill 48; images -> Skill 47; GHL delivery -> Skill 6) all ride EXISTING rails; a brand-intelligence job is an existing tasks / marketing Kanban row (fail-soft). It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change, so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Cross-linked with (never merged into) Skill 55; the tone subsystem is a lockstep copy of the shared shared-utils/tone-writing-core/ referenced by Skills 53/54. v16.8.0 registers Skill 56 (sales-page-assets): the Direct-Response sibling of Skill 49 AUTHORS the 8-section main A/B + countdown, the 9-section Trevor Otts upsell, the downsell, the Sovereign Architect high-ticket long-form, the order-bump copy, and the slice-covered image plan inside its own fail-closed pipeline, then DELEGATES image generation to Skill 47 (or the client's own image provider) and ALL GoHighLevel media + funnel/page build to Skill 6 (the ONE GHL delivery rail) via Skill 6's EXISTING REST canvas / builder + media endpoints, and routes the bump to Skill 44; a 'sales page assets' / direct-response A/B request routes to it through the shared STEP-0 funnel-engine selector registry in Skill 6 (06-ghl-install-pages/funnel-engines/registry.json) as the SECOND registered engine. It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change, so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Client runtime uses the CLIENT's own model providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys); publish is human-approved.
